eyebrow.zh: 离线 · 零 API key · 秒级

headline.zh:
代码注释里藏的指令
你的 agent 会照做——先拦下
headline.en:
Instructions hidden in comments
your agent will follow — block them first

sub.zh: 有人会把删库、偷密钥外发这类指令藏进注释、docstring 或 commit message，等 Claude Code / Cursor 读到并照做。PromptShield 在 agent 读取仓库、diff 或 PR 之前，把这些文本扫一遍——命中任何 HIGH 就让 CI 变红。
sub.en: Someone hides delete-the-repo or secret-stealing commands in comments, docstrings or commit messages, waiting for Claude Code or Cursor to read and follow them. Before your agent reads a repo, diff or PR, PromptShield scans that text — any HIGH turns CI red.

title.zh: 扫的是 agent 真会照做的那段文本
title.en: Scans the text your agent will actually follow

body.zh: 注释、docstring、commit message、markdown、配置、字符串字面量——这些 agent 会读进上下文并照做的文本，逐段扫一遍；不是把代码当依赖包查 CVE。
body.en: Comments, docstrings, commit messages, markdown, config, string literals — the text an agent reads into context and acts on, scanned segment by segment. Not code-as-a-dependency CVE check.

title.zh: 五类藏起来的注入，都认得

body.zh: 对 agent 喊话覆盖指令、删库销数据、偷读密钥外发、骗 agent 滥用工具、用编码或 Unicode 藏载荷——五类都能命中；高噪声措辞二次确认压误报，让你信得过每一个告警。
body.en: Instruction overrides, data destruction, secret exfiltration, tool abuse, obfuscated payloads — five classes, all caught; noisy wording gets a second confirmation to keep false alarms down so every alert is one you trust.

title.zh: 藏在编码层背后的，照样抓

body.zh: 有人把注入塞进 base64、hex、零宽字符或同形字里躲过人工 review——每段文本会先解码再扫一遍，藏在编码层背后的注入照样命中。
body.en: Someone stuffs an injection into base64, hex, zero-width or homoglyph characters to dodge human review — every segment is decoded and rescanned, so an injection hidden behind an encoding layer is still caught.

title.zh: CI 一变红，Security 面板留底
title.en: CI goes red, Security tab keeps the record

body.zh: 出现任何 HIGH 就退出 1 让 check 变红；同时输出 SARIF 上传到 GitHub Security 标签页——即便 check 红了，发现项照样留底。扫描不发网络请求，不需要 git 或 gh。
body.en: Any HIGH exits 1 to turn the check red; SARIF is uploaded to the GitHub Security tab — even when the check fails, the findings stay on record. The scan makes no network calls and needs no git or gh.

headline.zh: 在每个 PR 上拦住藏起来的注入
headline.en: Block hidden injections on every PR

sub.zh: MIT 许可，pip install promptshield 即用；把仓库自带的 workflow 复制进 .github/workflows/，每个 PR 自动拦住高风险注入。
sub.en: MIT-licensed, pip install promptshield; copy the bundled workflow into .github/workflows/ and every PR auto-blocks HIGH injections.
